title: Neostapfia colusana
intro: Neostapfia colusana, also known as Colusa grass, is a rare, perennial plant species endemic to California, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in treating various conditions like wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Neostapfia colusana include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Neostapfia colusana is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
